ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: PRIORVALUE(IsClosed) && !IsBlank(Appartement__c) && !IsClosed && !PRIORVALUE(IsWon) && text(Appartement__r.Status__c) != "Available" && OR(text(Appartement__r.Status__c) != "Kontingent", AND(text(Appartement__r.Status__c) = "Kontingent", AccountId != Appartement__r.ContingentRequester__c, Account.ParentId != Appartement__r.ContingentRequester__c) )
